title: Verbes irréguliers (TOEIC)
description: Les 30 verbes irréguliers les plus fréquents au TOEIC

cards.example: She sent the invoice yesterday.
He has written the report.
They met the client on Monday.
I found the missing file.
They made a profit last quarter.
She has taken charge of the project.
He knew the answer immediately.
The manager gave approval.
The meeting was held on Tuesday.
The company bought new equipment.
They sold two hundred units last week.
The invoice was paid on time.
She spoke at the conference.
They built a new distribution centre.
She led the team to success.
He understood the contract terms.
The project has already begun.
They chose a new supplier.
Revenue has grown by fifteen percent.
She left the company last month.
Costs have risen sharply.
The graph shows quarterly results.
They cut operational costs by ten percent.
She runs the marketing department.
We got the contract signed.
Please put the documents on my desk.
Management let employees work from home.
They set a new sales record.
He read the terms and conditions carefully.
She kept all the receipts for expenses.
